linkedin_content.hook: You're wasting time checking for brand mentions every morning
linkedin_content.body:
You know you're missing key insights. Your brand's online presence is crucial, and you can't afford to overlook any mentions.

Manually tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines is a time-consuming task. You have to repeat this process every day, which takes away from other important tasks. You could be using this time to develop new marketing campaigns or engage with your target audience.

The risk of missing key insights is high when you're manually tracking brand mentions. You might overlook a crucial mention or fail to notice a shift in sentiment. This could lead to missed opportunities or a failure to address negative feedback. Your brand's reputation is at stake.

If you don't find a way to streamline your brand mention tracking, you'll continue to waste time and risk missing important insights. Your competitors might be using more efficient methods to track their brand mentions, which could give them an edge in the market. You need to find a better way to stay on top of your brand's online presence.

Searchable is a solution that drives growth through AI search insights. By using Searchable, you can gain a better understanding of your brand's online presence and make data-driven decisions. You'll no longer have to spend hours manually tracking brand mentions and rankings.

With Searchable, you can expect to see a significant improvement in your brand's share of voice. In fact, Searchable has been shown to deliver a 206% share of voice improvement. This means you'll be able to increase your brand's visibility and reach a wider audience. You'll also be able to track your brand mentions and rankings in real-time, which will help you stay ahead of the competition.

You can start driving growth for your brand today by signing up for a Searchable trial. This will give you access to the tools and insights you need to take your brand to the next level. You'll be able to see the benefits of Searchable for yourself and make an informed decision about whether it's right for your brand. Start your free trial now and discover a better way to track your brand mentions and rankings.

formatted_content.revision_hint_applied: Remove the fabricated '30 minutes daily' stat and replace it with a more general statement of the problem, such as 'Manually tracking brand mentions is a time-consuming task' to improve accuracy.

evaluator_output.scores_rationale: The copy is easy to understand, and the structure is logical, but some sentences are a bit long and could be broken up for better flow. The hook is effective in grabbing the reader's attention, and the copy does a good job of creating a sense of urgency and highlighting the benefits of using Searchable. The tone is generally conversational and outcome-focused, but there are a few places where the language could be more concise and direct, and the use of 'drives growth' in the introduction of Searchable is slightly promotional. The copy accurately reflects the primary claim and uses the provided proof point to support its claims, without inventing any statistics or facts.
